headlines.title: The threat to summer holidays looming from jet fuel shortages
headlines.description: What impact might shortages have on our summer holidays - and what could be done about it?

headlines.title: Some Iranians fear the regime is now more entrenched - and ready for revenge
headlines.description: Ordinary Iranians tell of worry about increased repression by authorities after the war is over.

headlines.title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
headlines.description: The World Health Organization said one case of hantavirus infection had been confirmed, with five more suspected cases under investigation.

headlines.title: Thousands could benefit from cancer jab that cuts treatment time to minutes
headlines.description: Thousands of patients will be offered a new injectable form of an immunotherapy drug that takes minutes.

headlines.title: What an empty car park tells us about the UK's debt problem
headlines.description: The BBC has been speaking to people living in one of England's poorest communities.

headlines.title: Princess Eugenie expecting third child this summer
headlines.description: "His Majesty The King has been informed and is delighted with the news," the Palace said on social media.

headlines.title: UK joining Ukraine loan scheme would be good for EU ties, Starmer says
headlines.description: The UK is "discussing participating" in a £78bn (€90bn) European Union loan scheme to support Ukraine, the prime minister says.

headlines.title: Chris Mason: Elections this week set to show how politics is changing
headlines.description: The scale of these elections looks set to vividly expose the breadth of Labour's vulnerabilities, Chris Mason writes.

headlines.title: Ukrainian drone hits upmarket Moscow high-rise ahead of Victory Day celebrations
headlines.description: The attack comes as the Kremlin prepares to hold a scaled-back military parade on Saturday.

headlines.title: Former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani in critical condition in hospital
headlines.description: The long-time champion of Trump and former New York mayor is in hospital, according to his spokesman.

headlines.title: BBC uncovers the Ugandan scammers abusing dogs to elicit donations from animal lovers
headlines.description: Unwitting donors hand over money to save suffering animals but Ugandan con artists pocket the cash.

headlines.title: Met Gala 2026: How to watch, the price of tickets and this year's theme
headlines.description: Beyoncé, who last attended the Met Gala in 2016, is returning as a co-chair of fashion's biggest night.

headlines.title: What life is like in the town with the UK’s worst mobile signal
headlines.description: Tenby is a “dead zone” for mobile signal, a business owner said, with the issue driving away customers.

headlines.title: 'I was trying to save a life,' man who intervened in Golders Green attack tells BBC
headlines.description: Ashkan Asadian said he acted on the spur of the moment without thinking about the danger of the situation.

headlines.title: What is the hantavirus that has been confirmed on an Atlantic cruise ship?
headlines.description: While rare, the disease can be transmitted to humans through inhalation of airborne particles from dried rodent droppings.

headlines.title: European leaders converge on Armenia as Russia looks on
headlines.description: Two European summits are being held in a country long considered Russia's closest ally in the region.

headlines.title: Amsterdam bans public adverts for meat and fossil fuels
headlines.description: Local politicians say the move is in line with the Dutch capital's environmental targets.

headlines.title: One injured after plane hits truck while landing in Newark
headlines.description: The Boeing 767, operating a flight from Venice, Italy, landed safely with no reported injuries among the 231 passengers and crew on board.

headlines.title: Police continue search after 'suspicious explosion'
headlines.description: Officers remain in the Frenchay area of Bristol where two people died in "suspicious blast" at house.

headlines.title: GameStop makes $55.5bn takeover offer for eBay
headlines.description: GameStop's boss Ryan Cohen says he sees potential to make eBay a much bigger rival to Amazon.

headlines.title: Antisemitism 'allowed to come into the open' says Bondi victim's daughter
headlines.description: Sheina Gutnick was the first person to give evidence at the royal commission investigating the attack.

headlines.title: Samsung family pays off record $8bn inheritance tax bill
headlines.description: The bill is tied to the estate left by the firm's late chairman Lee Kun-hee, who died in  October 2020.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: The Week: The Price Of The Iran War
headlines.description: Could financial uncertainty from the Iran war stop a Starmer leadership challenge?

headlines.title: LIVE at Maida Vale studios… How popular is Donald Trump in the US?
headlines.description: And why isn't there more support for Democrats?

headlines.title: Emma Stone and Ryan Gosling star in an award-winning musical
headlines.description: An aspiring actress and a dedicated jazz musician fall in love in modern-day Los Angeles.

headlines.title: Antonelli steps up his level in dramatic fashion
headlines.description: Kimi Antonelli's first season in F1 showed occasional promise, but nothing that suggested this was going to come next, writes Andrew Benson.

headlines.title: 'Premflix' and tourist fans - future of football predictions
headlines.description: Former broadcasting executive Neil Duncanson and author Alex Fynn, who made remarkably accurate predictions about football's future in 1994, discuss what the game will look like in 10 years' time.

headlines.title: What happened to Everton's £40m signing Dibling?
headlines.description: The curious case of Tyler Dibling - BBC Sport chief football writers asks what has happened to Everton's £40m youngster and what does the future hold?

headlines.title: Wu in control of Crucible final against Murphy
headlines.description: Wu Yize opens up a 10-7 lead over Shaun Murphy in the World Championship final to put himself on course to become the second-youngest player ever to be crowned a Crucible champion.

headlines.title: Davide Ancelotti: My dad, my tactics and Brazil's World Cup prospects
headlines.description: Brazil assistant manager Davide Ancelotti sits down with BBC Sport's tactics expert Umir Irfan to discuss his coaching philosophy, inspirations and ideals.
